final_trading_notice: Final trading is manually decided by the user.
research_limitations: This is an internal consistency check against committed Yahoo Chart public JSON cache and derived repo artifacts, not a live second-vendor market-data certification.
The report supports ETF research robustness only and is not investment advice, automatic trading, or order placement.

benchmark_preserved.description: The Stage 3.1 reviewed monthly panel preserves VTI as benchmark for downstream robustness work.

cache_manifest_integrity.description: Cache files, hashes, row counts, symbols, and source metadata match the committed raw price file.

cache_to_raw_price_match.description: Adjusted closes reconstructed from committed raw cache JSON match normalized raw CSV prices within tolerance.

raw_to_monthly_panel_match.description: Month-end values in the reviewed monthly panel match the committed normalized raw CSV rows.

universe_allowlist.description: Raw and monthly-panel symbols are all present in configs/universe/etf_universe.yaml.

work_package: Stage 3.2 WP1 research robustness source validation
